Video.summary: Michael and Larken travel to South Carolina's Lowcountry for a massive barbecue charity event supporting children battling serious illness. After serving up smoke for a great cause, they spend an extra day in the marsh chasing redfish and speckled trout.
Video.title: "Holy Smokes"

Video.summary: Kyle Green is joined by his childhood friends in his home state of Michigan for a trout fishing adventure. They visit the most dynamic landmarks in the Upper Peninsula, do a little cliff jumping, and finish out the trip cooking trout riverside.
Video.title: "Upper Peninsula Trout Adventures"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alaska"

Video.summary: The bite’s dead during a neap tide, but Josh and Isaiah don’t back down. Watch them adapt, pivot, and turn a tough day into a hard-earned win. It’s not luck—it’s hustle.
Video.title: "Neap tide Hustle"

Video.summary: Continuing on with his quest for The North America Deer Slam, Mark Peterson packs his Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC rifle for a hunt in Mexico targeting the elusive Mexican Texanus Whitetail from elevated blinds. The outfitter here has done an amazing job managing the deer numbers and age groups to grow giant whitetails. Mark is anticipating the pre-rut will get these big bucks moving.
Video.title: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Image.alt: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Video.summary: Willi and Chris have hunted NM for years with some success each year. This year they include two new friends, Nick Ventura and his dad. They receive rain like they never had before and when they finally make it out to hunt, Willi is hoping to connect.
Video.title: "Willi's New Mexico Thunder Bull"

Video.summary: Mike is hunting public land in Alabama and has birds gobbling first thing. Listening and watching how this gobbler responds to calling and interacts with the hens with him, Mike relies on good ol experience to know how to setup to kill this longbeard.
Video.title: "PUBLIC LAND ALABAMA TURKEY'S"

Video.summary: This may be the craziest turkey hunt you see all year! Mark Scroggins and son Colten are hunting Rio's in Texas and have a crazy bull jake in close range. When we say close, we mean CLOSE! The jake fun is interrupted by an aggressive gobbler that is closing fast. Colten has to go Ninja to make it happen.
Video.title: "CRAZIEST JAKE & LONGBEARD TURKEY HUNT"

Video.summary: The WoodHaven crew travels south to hunt with Jay Scott Outdoors, bringing along Tyler Jordan for his first-ever Gould’s turkey hunt. What starts as a goal to tag one bird quickly turns into an unforgettable hunt in some of the best Gould’s turkey country in Mexico.
Video.title: "Gould's Turkey Part 1"

Video.summary: Jeff Danker of Buckventures, returns to his home state of Oklahoma to chase a legendary buck on the Wallahchie Ranch — the "Big 8". With his bow in hand and one specific target in mind, the crew sets up in a blind for what turns into one of the craziest hunts they've ever experienced.
Video.title: "Bowhunting the Big 8"

Video.summary: Mike highlights some of the best fishing destinations throughout St. Pete and Clearwater.
Video.title: "Pinellas County Collection"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike heads to the Lowcountry to rendezvous with good friend Capt. Ben Alderman.
Video.title: "Tug is the Drug"

Video.summary: Mike reunites with his South Seas comrade for a day of trout madness.
Video.title: "Lessinger Is More"

Video.summary: Mike heads to the back, back-country where even the fish struggle to find water.
Video.title: "Mud Boat Adventures of Brian Sawyer"

Video.summary: CA revisits some of the best moments of the year and some never before seen footage!
Video.title: "Bonus Round"

Video.summary: C.A. heads to Murrells Inlet, SC for some low country lure slingin'. What's on your menu? Shrimp and grits or Flounder?
Video.title: "Flounder Popsicle"

Video.summary: C.A. Fishes in his home waters for probably the most powerful inshore fish, the gag grouper.
Video.title: "Pittbulls of the Rocks"

Video.summary: Road trip time! Embrace the frigid temps with CA on this special episode, fishing for the cape Fear Slam.
Video.title: "Cape Fear Coercion"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss ventures to South Florida with the hope of having a few Exotic Encounters.
Video.title: "Exotic Encounters"

Video.summary: Despite adverse conditions, Capt. Jonathan Moss and long time friend, Capt. Adam Whitson, are heading out on the water in search of the Crystal River Inshore Slam.
Video.title: "Weather or Not"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss is heading offshore into the Gulf of America, eager to feed his offshore fishing obsession.
Video.title: "Offshore Obsession"

Video.summary: Central Florida’s St. John’s River is home to countless species of wildlife, making this sweet water estuary the perfect playground for a pair of river rats, Captains Jonathan Moss and Nick Clark.
Video.title: "River Rats"

Video.summary: We kick off Season 2 in Tennessee where we stop in Nashville, Townsend, and Johnson City!!
Video.title: "Traveling Over 2,000 Miles to Fish HERE!"

Video.summary: This episode we make our way through the mountains of western North Carolina, where we stop in Asheville and Cashiers!!
Video.title: "Dry Fly Fishing HEAVEN (Wild Trout)"

Video.summary: Massive wildfires had consumed thousands of acres across the Bighorn Mountains and the neighboring foothills. Would the annual HuntStand pronghorn camp be a total bust, or would the crew be able to find a few animals beyond the smoke?
Video.title: "BEYOND THE SMOKE"

Video.summary: About 2-3 months ago Mark purchased a 300+ acre farm in Kentucky. After running trail cameras and putting food plots on the farm, Mark now has the chance to get in the stand on opening day of Kentucky's bow season. There have been plenty of shooter bucks on the farm but only a few still are holding their velvet. Mark has his sights set on a Giant Kentucky Velvet Whitetail. The day before opening day Salt River puts on a celebration that features the @theswonbrothers.
Video.title: "Giant Kentucky Velvet Whitetails"

Video.summary: It's 2016 and Mark heads down to Kansas for an early season Muzzleloader Whitetail hunt with Salt River Outfitters. It was hot in the stand with little deer movement until the moon phase switched and - one of the bucks Mark had been looking for stepped out. Kansas is one of those states that has an early Muzzleloader season that opens in September, and if you can get the weather and the moon to align you can catch a big deer on his feet in daylight.
Video.title: "Giant 15 Point Kansas Whitetail, Early Season Hunt"

Image.alt: "Giant 15 Point Kansas Whitetail, Early Season Hunt"
"Giant 15 Point Kansas Whitetail, Early Season Hunt"
"Giant 15 Point Kansas Whitetail, Early Season Hunt"

Video.summary: Join Mark Peterson on an epic hunting adventure in the stunning landscapes of New Zealand as he goes after Whitetail deer. On this hunt, Mark was unable to get his firearms import permit in time to take his Gunwerks rifle, so he'd have to borrow a trusty rifle from his guide, Shawn. Get ready for heart-pounding action, breathtaking scenery, and valuable tips and tricks from a seasoned hunter.
Video.title: "Hunting Whitetail In New Zealand"

Video.summary: Mark continues his quest in New Zealand, but this time, after a Wapiti. On this hunt, Mark was unable to get his firearms import permit in time to take his Gunwerks rifle, so he'd again have to borrow from his guide, Shawn. Elk were first introduced to New Zealand in 1909 when President Roosevelt gifted a herd of 20 animals that were released on the South Island. Get ready to immerse yourself in the beauty of nature that New Zealand has to offer.
Video.title: "Hunting Wapiti in New Zealand"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff wade into the flooded timber of the legendary Coca-Cola Woods, where mallards drop through the treetops in waves. Amidst echoes of calling and wingbeats, they experience one of America’s most iconic duck hunts.
Video.title: "The Coca-Cola Woods"

Video.summary: Kyle Green and Jeff Hutchinson head to Northern Maine to hunt for moose and learn about the conservation of this species which is under attack by winter ticks. Can reducing moose numbers be the key to saving the local moose population from this deadly parasite?
Video.title: "The Maine Moose"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff embark on a 20-day mission into the Everglades to find the invasive pythons that are plaguing the ecosystem. These apex predators have eliminated more than 90% of fur-bearing animals in their new home. Can they turn the tide, or is the Everglades already lost?
Video.title: "The Everglades Python"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff get bit by catfish in Southern Oklahoma with YouTuber Nate Williams of Adrenaline Rush Adventures while using the most primitive fishing tactic - hand fishing. Learn from the Chickasaw Nation about the history of this method that has been used by Native Americans for thousands of years.
Video.title: "Oklahoma Catfish Noodling"

Video.summary: Famous for its Mayan ruins, the Yucatan in Mexico is home to a diverse array of wildlife. After years of over-harvesting and exploitation, regulated hunting is helping to conserve large areas of this fragile ecosystem. Dan Cabela travels to the region to find out more.
Video.title: "Into the Yucatán"

Video.summary: Embark on a journey through Scotland's hunting traditions, exploring bird shoots, grouse moors, and red stag hunts while discovering the evolving role of hunting in conservation.
Video.title: "Scotland’s Hunting Tradition"

Video.summary: Michael continues the family tradition of fish stew and gathering, with hopes that Larkin will pass on the same traditions.
Video.title: "Family Recipe"

Video.summary: Michael and Larken Letchworth set out on a new adventure, exploring food fishing and the great outdoors. This father son duo are making memories that will last a lifetime and will forever be etched in the digital world.
Video.title: "The Beginning"

Video.summary: Hop in the float plane—a new episode of DIRT just dropped. The DIRT crew made their way to Alaska, “the land of earth, sea, and sky.” All feast, no sleep is the name of the game as Josh makes the most of Alaska’s abundant and legendary daylight alongside local guides, fishermen, and even a couple grizzlies. There’ll be plenty of time to hibernate in winter. But for now—join us—there are halibut to filet, rainforest ’shrooms to forage, and mountainside meals to cook up.
Video.title: DIRT - "Alaskan Fishing, Foraging, & Mountainside Cooking with Local Legends"

Image.alt: DIRT - "Alaskan Fishing, Foraging, & Mountainside Cooking with Local Legends"
DIRT - "Alaskan Fishing, Foraging, & Mountainside Cooking with Local Legends"
DIRT - "Alaskan Fishing, Foraging, & Mountainside Cooking with Local Legends"

Video.summary: From battling towering 12-foot waves in the Gulf of Alaska, to reeling in colossal 200 lb. halibut, they discover firsthand the rugged beauty of America's 49th state. This episode highlights Lindell Yachts as a top builder of rugged offshore sportfishing yachts, as well as Radon Boats as great pilothouse fishing and guide boats.
Video.title: "Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 1"

Image.alt: "Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 1"
"Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 1"
"Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 1"

Video.summary: Capt Josh and Johnny from Johnny Jigs head out with gorgeous weather on their side to hit some reefs and put the jigs to work!
Video.title: "Johnny Jigs"

Video.summary: Captain Josh and the fam head out to do some surf fishing to see what’s biting. Then ended the day building professional sand castles and playing goofy golf.
Video.title: "Family Fun"

Video.summary: Josh and Alex explore the SS United States; the world‘s largest artificial reef.
Video.title: "Wrecked Em'"

Video.summary: During this episode of Ship Shape TV Essentials the SSTV team follows the project of a detailed retrofitting of a Bertram upgrading from one motor to twin engines with the help of an Armstrong Bracket. The team then heads to Boatwrench Inc. to rebuild the carburetor for the Glastron project.
Video.title: Essentials - "Twin Engine Bracket Retrofit & Rebuilding a Carburetor"

Image.alt: Essentials - "Twin Engine Bracket Retrofit & Rebuilding a Carburetor"
Essentials - "Twin Engine Bracket Retrofit & Rebuilding a Carburetor"
Essentials - "Twin Engine Bracket Retrofit & Rebuilding a Carburetor"

Video.summary: In this episode, we will explore where the locals dive and experience the underwater gems where the natives love to hang out in the Florida Keys.
Video.title: "Dive like a Native"

Video.summary: On this adventure we travel to Colorado and hook up with an organization called "Angling with officers" and we jump in the boat with some courageous law enforcement officers from local departments. We also honor the Rapid City, SD SCHEELS Hometown Hero, David Pearcy!
Video.title: "Angling With Officers"

Video.summary: On this episode, we travel to Missouri River near Chamberlain, SD and connect with the South Dakota chapter of Paralyzed Veterans of America for the Joel Niemeyer "Gone Fishing" event. We get to guide and share the story of 100 year old WW2 Veteran Kenneth Carlson and his family. We also honor our next Rochester, MN Scheels Hometown Hero, Dustin Draeger!
Video.title: "Paralyzed Veterans Of America"

Video.summary: On this episode we travel to Rock Falls Raceway in Wisconsin to highlight our nations heroes who have made drag racing and serving our country a way of life! We also honor our next Fargo Scheels Hometown hero, Elizabeth Miller.
Video.title: "Zenzen Racing"

Video.summary: On this episode, we travel north of the border for an unforgettable PART 1 Canadian fly-in fishing trip with Mandatory Fun Outdoors. We also highlight our next Scheels Hometown Hero, Jay Strande!
Video.title: "Canadian Fly-In With Mandatory Fun "Part 1""

Video.summary: Mark Peterson's thrilling adventure in Tanzania continues as he sets his sights on the elusive Grant's Gazelle and the striking Fringe-Eared Oryx. Armed with his precision-engineered Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC, Mark is poised to make every shot count. The real challenge lies not just in the accuracy of his aim but in getting close enough to these magnificent creatures.
Video.title: "Grant’s Gazelle and Fringe-Eared Oryx - Tanzania"

Video.summary: Join Mark Peterson on an epic Arctic Grizzly hunting expedition in the unexpectedly warm Alaskan wilderness. Spot and stalk alongside Mark as he navigates the icy landscapes using a boat for transportation, all while tracking down this legendary predator. Experience the thrill of the chase and the breathtaking beauty of the Arctic scenery in this adrenaline-fueled adventure set in the heart of Alaska.
Video.title: "Alaska Arctic Grizzly"

Video.summary: Willi heads back to Ohio to hunt a lease with good friends, Nick, Tom and Jason. He had a unique hunt the previous year on a golf course. They didn’t lease the golf course this year, but it was the same group hunting a familiar piece of property.
Video.title: "Stickers In Ohio"

Video.summary: Jake Huebschman with The Hunting Public is in Iowa during the rut when he spots a mature buck locked down with a doe. Jake decides to get aggressive, closing the distance and mimicking an intruder buck to trigger a response. Watch as the plan unfolds in real time, showing how bold moves can pay off when hunting pressured whitetails.
Video.title: "Iowa Public Land Hunt"

Video.summary: Everything comes together for Mike and Jacob in the Alabama turkey woods. After the hunt, Mike talks about the Ninja calling tricks that finally pulled this gobbler into range.
Video.title: "FATHER & SON TURKEY HUNT"

Video.summary: Join Gavin as he heads afield in Pennsylvania to chase gobblers. He finds himself in the middle of a perfect off the roost hunt that was captured beautifully.
Video.title: The - "The PERFECT Turkey Hunt | Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania"

Image.alt: The - "The PERFECT Turkey Hunt | Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania"
The - "The PERFECT Turkey Hunt | Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania"
The - "The PERFECT Turkey Hunt | Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania"

Video.summary: Slade Northwest heads to Montana for some goose.
Video.title: "Gentleman's Goose"
